rules.rule_text:
rule win_mal_HwAudKiller
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		description = "Detects HwAudKiller BYOVD AV/EDR killer "
		date = "3/16/2025"
		hash = "28278b8c85c832417f9860fe8ea3ddbb9ff1d5860317db4813227a3a52b7c7cc"

	strings:
		$s1 = "[+] Havoc Process Terminator"
		$s2 = "sc create Havoc"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and all of ( $s* )
}
